name: @rhizomatics/signalk-datalab-plugin
description: Interactive data analysis notebooks for SignalK, using Marimo running as WebAssembly in the browser. ALPHA, use with caution. See also signalk-cli on PyPi.

scripts.build:icons: rsvg-convert -w 512 -h 512 assets/logo.svg -o public/android-chrome-512x512.png && rsvg-convert -w 192 -h 192 assets/logo.svg -o public/android-chrome-192x192.png && rsvg-convert -w 180 -h 180 assets/logo.svg -o public/apple-touch-icon.png && rsvg-convert -w 32 -h 32 assets/logo.svg -o public/favicon-32x32.png && rsvg-convert -w 16 -h 16 assets/logo.svg -o public/favicon-16x16.png && cp assets/logo.svg public/logo.svg
scripts.build:wasm: uv run --with marimo marimo export html-wasm notebooks/signalk.py -o public/ --mode edit -f && npm run build:icons && cp notebooks/CLAUDE.md public/
scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:wasm

author: jey burrows
